ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., object detection, segmentation) */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter set */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the hyperparameters belong to */,
  "filter_scaling" INTEGER /* Filter scaling hyperparameter */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth hyperparameter */,
  "batchsize" INTEGER /* Batch size hyperparameter */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number hyperparameter */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate hyperparameter */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer hyperparameter (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function hyperparameter (e.g., cross-entropy, mean squared error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter set the result belongs to */,
  "highest_val_acc" REAL /* Highest validation accuracy achieved */,
  "lowest_val_loss" REAL /* Lowest validation loss achieved */,
  "threshold_max" REAL /* Maximum threshold value */,
  "mAP_max" REAL /* Maximum mAP value */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_augmentation_results" (
  "augmentation_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result with data augmentation */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the augmented result belongs to */,
  "threshold_max_augmentation" REAL /* Maximum threshold value with data augmentation */,
  "mAP_max_augmentation" REAL /* Maximum mAP value with data augmentation */,
  "augmentation_technique" TEXT /* Data augmentation technique used (e.g., rotation, flipping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("augmentation_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_augmentation_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_user" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_user" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the result (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_augmentation_results_user" (
  "augmentation_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data augmentation result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the data augmentation result (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("augmentation_result_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter the change belongs to */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the hyperparameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the hyperparameter */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_history_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the change belongs to */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the result */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the result */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_augmentation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "augmentation_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data augmentation result the change belongs to */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the data augmentation result */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data augmentation result */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_augmentation_history_augmentation_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("augmentation_result_id") REFERENCES data_augmentation_results ("augmentation_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_augmentation_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the change belongs to */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the model */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the model */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_tags_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)
